entries.title: Business Line of Credit
entries.description: Potential revolving-access path for businesses with stronger revenue, credit, and operating history.

entries.title: Equipment / Truck / Asset-Backed Funding
entries.description: Potential path for revenue-producing equipment, vehicles, trucks, repairs, or asset-backed needs.

entries.title: Ecommerce / Marketplace Seller Capital
entries.description: Potential path for ecommerce or marketplace sellers with sales history and platform data.

entries.title: Real Estate / Asset-Secured Capital
entries.description: Potential path for property-backed or project-specific capital.

entries.title: Startup / Credit-Leverage Funding
entries.description: Potential path for newer operators where personal credit, income, and clean setup may matter more than business history.

entries.title: Fast Working Capital
entries.description: Potential path for operators with recurring business deposits and short-term cash-flow needs.

entries.title: Business Credit Builder / Funding Prep
entries.description: Prep path for owners who need better setup, documents, banking posture, or credit readiness before a deeper funding review.

entries.title: Manual Funding Strategy Review
entries.description: Human review path when the answers need context before suggesting a funding direction.
